Scan.title: Threat Scan
Scan.description: Represents an individual analyzed file, screenshot, or text snippet

userId.description: UID of the user performing the scan

content.description: The analyzed text or URL of the uploaded asset

confidenceScore.description: AI confidence in its classification from 0 to 1

threatCategory.description: Categorized threat type (e.g., Scam, Phishing, Misinformation, Safe)

explanation.description: Detailed AI reasoning for the classification

evidence.description: Identified indicators (suspicious URLs, high pressure, deepfakes)

recommendedActions.description: Actionable security protocols for the user

KnowledgeChunk.title: Knowledge Chunk
KnowledgeChunk.description: Chunked security bulletins or official warnings used for grounding the RAG pipeline

scans/{scanId}.description: Stores analyzed threat scans for audit and dashboard history.

knowledge/{chunkId}.description: Trusted references used to ground Gemini reasoning.
